questions.question: What is the primary difference between Hadoop and RDBMS in terms of data storage and retrieval?
questions.hint: Focus on the key characteristics of each

questions.question: Explain the concept of a MapReduce program in the context of Hadoop. What are the main components involved?
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of the MapReduce process

questions.question: Describe the trade-offs between using Hadoop for data storage and analysis compared to using a Relational Database Management System (RDBMS). Provide examples of when each might be preferred.
questions.hint: Consider both technical and practical aspects
